hooks.command: git pull --ff-only || echo "[session] pull pulou: branch divergente ou alteracoes locais — sincronize a mao"

D=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && V="$(dirname "$D")/vvcore" && { [ -d "$V/.git" ] || git clone https://github.com/fabiozaffani/vvcore.git "$V"; } && bash "$V/bin/setup-links.sh" || echo "[vvcore] bootstrap pulou"
